label: 251 to 256 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–628, § 1(a)82 Stat. 1320Oct. 22, 1968
notes: Section 251, acts , ; , , set standards for Climax baskets for grapes and other fruits and vegetables and for mushrooms.Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 139 Stat. 673June 11, 1934, ch. 447, § 148 Stat. 930
Section 252, , , set standards for standard basket or container for small fruits and vegetables.act Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 239 Stat. 673
Section 253, acts , ; , c. 447, § 2, , set penalties for failure to conform to standards.Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 339 Stat. 67448 Stat. 930June 11, 1934

Section 254, , , provided for examinations and tests by Department of Agriculture and for promulgation of rules and regulations covering allowable tolerances and variations.act Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 439 Stat. 674
Section 255, acts , ; , , made United States attorney responsible for commencing actions to enforce penalties.Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 539 Stat. 674June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 162 Stat. 909
Section 256, , , covered guaranty given by manufacturers or sellers of baskets as to correctness of such containers.act Aug. 31, 1916, ch. 426, § 639 Stat. 674
